title: rubus × laxus
intro: Rubus × laxus, also known as hybrid black raspberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × laxus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce cancer risk, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus × laxus can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
